title: rubus schleicheri subsp. humifusum
intro: Rubus schleicheri subsp. humifusum, also known as a low-growing, deciduous, thorny shrub, is a subspecies of the Rubus schleicheri plant. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its astringent and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, including soothing digestive issues and reducing inflammation in the body. Rubus schleicheri subsp. humifusum can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, allowing for a safe and natural way to harness its medicinal properties.
